CustomField.description: Choose the Pro-Rate calculation method 360 or actual days for MR calculation, Reconciliation and Cashflow Forecasting. If the field is left empty, then no pro-rata will be calculated.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Choose the Pro-Rate calculation method 360 or actual days for MR calculation, Reconciliation and Cashflow Forecasting. If the field is left empty, then no pro-rata will be calculated.
CustomField.label: Pro-Rata Number Of Days For Utilization

value.fullName: Actual number of days in month/year
value.label: Actual number of days in month/year
